issue_title: [WW-5121] Fix: remove contention during Scope.SINGLETON injection
issue_body:
Fixes the contention issue described in WW-5121 by applying a double-null-check-with-volatile pattern to avoid the synchronized cost on each and every injection of the singleton.

Same patch as #478 but against the Struts 2.5.x branch.
issue_comments:
['
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/builds/38164614/badge)](https://coveralls.io/builds/38164614)

', 'Awesome :clap: thanks a lot!']

issue_title: [WW-5121] Fix: remove contention during Scope.SINGLETON injection
issue_body:
Fixes the contention issue described in WW-5121 by applying a double-null-check-with-volatile pattern to avoid the `synchronized` cost on each and every injection of the singleton.

This pull request applies to branch master (Struts 2.6.x).

This pull request applies to branch master (Struts 2.6.x).

issue_title: [WW-5119] Fix: remove contention during localized text lookup (JDK 1.7+)
issue_body:
Backport of pull request #476 for Struts 2.5.x (JDK 1.7 still supported in this branch).

The `ConcurrentHashMap.newKeySet()` usage (available only in JDK 1.8+) is replaced by a `ConcurrentHashMap<String,Boolean>` to guarantee JDK 1.7 compatibility.

Fixes [WW-5119](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/WW-5119)
issue_comments:
['

', 'nice 👏 
LGTM 👍 ']

issue_body:
This PR reorders objects on `ValueStack` and puts action always on top just before tag. In such case any `%{..}` will be evaluated against action first and then against the tag itself.

Fixes [WW-5117](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/WW-5117)
issue_comments:
['
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/builds/38198531/badge)](https://coveralls.io/builds/38198531)

Coverage increased (+0.007%) to 47.312% when pulling **af6d3868b88a886e750b209a23b916966431998a on WW-5117-reorders-stack** into **39d70e394417a2a41c5fccccfcd1b2a9f15ad19a on struts-2-5-x**.
', 'Please squash this PR if so']
issue_text:
[WW-5117] Reorders stack
This PR reorders objects on `ValueStack` and puts action always on top just before tag. In such case any `%{..}` will be evaluated against action first and then against the tag itself.

Fixes [WW-5117](https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/WW-5117)
commit_message:
[WW-5117] Reorders stack (#475)

* Moves action on top just before the tag
* Moves pushes out of try-finally block

issue_title: WW-2411 Add a maxlength attribute to the textarea tag
issue_body: Maxlength attribute added to textarea tag
issue_comments:
['
[![Coverage Status](https://coveralls.io/builds/37478080/badge)](https://coveralls.io/builds/37478080)

Coverage increased (+0.002%) to 49.899% when pulling **255b563dcf34d73ad6d94f71bf1331147714441a on kerttup:Branch_1** into **eb8bc5e910f1da575e2bc8df752c97912a41378f on apache:master**.
', 'You must also modify [`template/simple/textarea.ftl`](https://github.com/apache/struts/blob/master/core/src/main/resources/template/simple/textarea.ftl#L21-L47), add something like this:
```
<#if parameters. maxlength?has_content>
 maxlength ="${parameters. maxlength}"<#rt/>
</#if>
```', 'Also would you mind adding `minlength`?
https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/textarea#attributes', 'Modified textarea.ftl and added also minlength attribute.', '@kerttup do you plan port these changes into 2.5.x branch?', 'Hi @lukaszlenart, what do you mean with plan port? This was my first pull request so I am new to this and dont know the practices yet.', 'We are currently developing two versions of Struts
- `master` branch represents incoming [Struts 2.6](https://issues.apache.org/jira/projects/WW/versions/12340222)
- `struts-2-5-x` branch is used to maintain current [Struts 2.5.x](https://issues.apache.org/jira/projects/WW/versions/12349611)

You addressed your fix just against the `master` branch which means it will be included in Struts 2.6 - this is fine if you can wait on that version to be released probably in a few months. If you would like to see your fix early, you must _port_ it to `struts-2-5-x` branch by cherry-picking the changes and opening a new PR against `struts-2-5-x` branch.
', 'Thanks for the clarification. I think this can wait until the next version.']
issue_text:
WW-2411 Add a maxlength attribute to the textarea tag 
Maxlength attribute added to textarea tag
commit_message:
Merge pull request #474 from kerttup/Branch_1

WW-2411 Add a maxlength attribute to the textarea tag
